Footer.body: Mobile auto detailing for private customers and businesses in East Flanders.

HomePage.title: Showroom ready without losing your time.
HomePage.subtitle: Park&Wash cleans vehicles at home or on location for private customers, SMEs and dealers.

basic.title: Basic detail
basic.body: Hand wash, wheels, tyres, windows, mats and detail finish.

intense.title: Intense detail
intense.body: Complete exterior wash with full interior cleaning.

paint.title: Paint corrections
paint.body: Correction of paint defects for more gloss and depth.

coating.title: Coatings
coating.body: Paint and finish protection with longer-lasting effect.

fleet.title: Businesses and fleets
fleet.body: Fleet care, dealer-ready cleaning and trial vehicle cleaning.

trust.title: Transparent
trust.body: Starting prices are clear and will be managed through admin.

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.body: The service comes to the customer based on planning and region.

business.title: For businesses
business.body: Fleet and dealer-ready packages remain easy to follow up.

ServicesPage.title: Choose a service and request a quote or callback.
ServicesPage.body: This preview helps visitors find the right service. Online reservation comes later, once real availability is confirmed server-side.

AboutPage.title: Mobile detailing from Melle, built on trust and precision.
AboutPage.body: This page will tell the story, process and why customers can trust Park&Wash with their key.

PortfolioPage.title: Before and after work will get a strong place here.
PortfolioPage.body: This page will later be filled with real projects, images and result categories.

ContactPage.title: Contact is the starting point for every request right now.
ContactPage.body: The form will later connect to Supabase and create a lead in the admin dashboard. Until the booking engine is live, follow-up stays manual.

BookingPage.title: Online booking is not active yet.
BookingPage.body: Park&Wash is handling requests through contact or quote intent for now. The booking wizard only goes live once real availability and server-side reservation confirmation are ready.

contact.label: I agree that Park&Wash may use my details to respond to my question.
contact.notice: We use your name, contact details and message only to handle your request and follow up if needed. We do not share your details with third parties for marketing.
contact.error: Confirm your consent to send your message.

booking.label: I agree that Park&Wash may use my details to respond to my request and follow up on a quote or callback.
booking.notice: We use your details only to handle your request, prepare a quote and contact you with questions. Online reservations will only be confirmed later through the server-side booking flow.
booking.error: Confirm your consent to continue your request.
